plugins.name: cm-stack-workflows
plugins.description: A structured development team plugin for Claude Code - 4 specialized agents and 8 workflow skills for the full SDLC: brainstorm, analyze, design, plan, task, fast-track, review-branch, and git-commit.

plugins.name: cm-stack-aws-knowledge
plugins.description: AWS documentation and knowledge plugin for Claude Code - 7 skills wrapping the AWS Knowledge MCP server for searching docs, reading pages, getting recommendations, listing regions, checking service availability, retrieving agent SOPs, and comprehensive AWS research.

plugins.name: cm-stack-local-wiki
plugins.description: LLM Wiki plugin for Claude Code - 5 skills implementing the Karpathy 'LLM Wiki' pattern for maintaining a structured personal knowledge base with Obsidian-compatible markdown: wiki-init, wiki-ingest, wiki-lint, wiki-query, and wiki-search.
